verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lazarus heard a voice though dead in the tomb, And Samuel heard the same, though yet a boy; We read of Moses and Paul who were changed in their ways, They heard the voice of God from a supernatural place.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Into a supernatural place, Hearing God’s voice, seeing His face, Heavenly words of light has shone on the bride, Oh, what a reflection of glory and grace! What a reflection of glory and grace.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the dark of night, God sent a light, To quicken us by the rising of the Son; Our gloom is passed away, We are looking at the day Thru eyes that see a supernatural place.
